ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Whether the experiment data is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clustering_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "binary_cut" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by binary cut */,
  "kmeans" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by k-means */,
  "pam" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by PAM */,
  "dynamic_tree_cut" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by dynamic tree cut */,
  "mclust" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by MCLUST */,
  "apcluster" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by APcluster */,
  "hdbscan" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by HDBSCAN */,
  "fast_greedy" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by fast greedy */,
  "louvain" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by Louvain */,
  "walktrap" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by walktrap */,
  "mcl" TEXT /* Number of clusters identified by MCL */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering method used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the clustering method */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the clustering method in seconds */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy or quality metric of the clustering result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the clustering result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clustering_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES clustering_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clustering_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clustering_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster detail */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering result the detail belongs to */,
  "method" TEXT /* Clustering method used (e.g., binary_cut, kmeans) */,
  "cluster_number" INTEGER /* Number of the cluster */,
  "gene_list" TEXT /* List of genes in the cluster */,
  "sample_list" TEXT /* List of samples in the cluster */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Number of genes or samples in the cluster */,
  "cluster_centroid" TEXT /* Centroid of the cluster (for methods that provide centroids) */,
  "cluster_score" REAL /* Score or quality metric of the cluster */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cluster detail */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the cluster detail was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_details_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES clustering_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES clustering_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_samples" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the gene and sample belong to */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the gene or sample is derived */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the sample is from */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell the sample is from */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence data of the gene */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the gene or sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id", "sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the condition value (e.g., °C, pH units) */,
  "control_value" TEXT /* Value of the control condition for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clustering_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the clustering method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clustering method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the clustering method */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Computational complexity of the method */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or citations for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, FASTQ) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity */,
  "upload_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_upload_by FOREIGN KEY ("upload_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering result the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES clustering_results ("result_id")
)
